experiment: E1 economics demo, single-call scale (paper/log.md 2026-07-04 wave 3)
task: ticket-triage: one real gpt-5.4-mini chat call per run, 60-ticket corpus

compiled_artifact.model: decision tree, 25 nodes, digest d4dcd404abca, trained on all 60 witnesses (holdout 0)

in_process_latency_ms.note: below 1ms timer resolution over the 60 gating replays; from the manifest

cold_process_invocation_ms.note: full auto-run process incl. per-process wasmtime module compilation; a resident server (auto-serve) holds the module warm

ratios_measured.marginal_cost: 55 usd-micros/call -> 0 (compile spend amortizes after ~60 replaced calls)

determinism_measurement.protocol: 20 tickets x 2 independent recording passes, witnessed >= 2
determinism_measurement.cross_store_refinement: the same single ambiguous ticket flipped in 2 of 4 total observations across stores; 59/60 tickets fully stable

honesty_caveats: single-call agent on a designed 60-ticket corpus; NOT the multi-step $0.50/40s agent of claim E1 at full scale

the artifact memorizes the witnessed distribution (no holdout generalization was achievable at n=60 on real-LLM labels; measured, then compiled with --holdout 0); the guard abstains beyond calibration (verified live on a novel out-of-vocabulary ticket, distance 0.9550 > threshold 0.9151)
recording spend (100 calls incl. determinism store, ~$0.0055) was direct owner API usage recorded via span attrs, not via the auto-frontier ledger
